headline: Amphenol Stock Rises 20% in 6 Months: Is There More Room for Growth?
summary: APH shares jump 20% in six months, fueled by AI data center demand, diversified markets and acquisitions like CCS.

headline: Hubbell to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conference
summary: Shelton, CT, March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE: HUBB) today announced that Joe Capozzoli, Chief Financial Officer, will appear at the JP Morgan Industrials Conference. The event will be webcast and is scheduled to begin at 12:15PM ET on Wednesday, March 18, 2026. The live audio of the event will be available and can be accessed by visiting Hubbell's Investor Relations section. You can also access this information by going to www.hubbell.com and selecting "Investors" f
